title: HIVE Digital Technologies September 2025 Bitcoin Production Surpasses 21 EH/s
text: HIVE Digital Technologies reported September 2025 bitcoin production at 267 BTC, climbing 8% month-over-month and 138% year-over-year, surpassing 21 EH/s and now producing 9 BTC per day. The company's operational hashrate reached 21 exahash per second, representing substantial growth from the prior year. Daily bitcoin production increased to 9 BTC per day from approximately 4 BTC per day in the prior year period. This significant increase reflects the successful deployment of additional mining infrastructure following the Bitfarms acquisition and Phase 2 completion. Bitcoin holdings continued to accumulate with the company maintaining over 2,100 BTC in treasury. The company's operational efficiency improved with continued optimization of mining hardware and deployment of advanced ASIC technology. Management's commentary indicated confidence in the ability to reach 25 EH/s targets by year-end 2025.
